title: stelis binotii
intro: Stelis binotii is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are thought to be due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Stelis binotii has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating digestive issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
